title: Ayushman Bharat – Rs. 5 Lakh Cover Benefits Poster
description: A print-ready poster explaining the Rs. 5 lakh per family annual health cover for display at PHCs, CHCs and empanelled hospitals.

title: How to Create Your Ayushman Card – Citizen Pamphlet
description: Step-by-step pamphlet for beneficiaries on creating an Ayushman Card via CSC, empanelled hospitals or the mobile app.

title: Am I Eligible? – Eligibility Criteria Infographic
description: A visual infographic summarising SECC 2011 eligibility criteria for AB-PMJAY and MMJAY in Bihar.

title: Cashless Treatment Process – Hospital Flyer
description: Explains the cashless, paperless treatment process at empanelled hospitals, from admission to discharge.

title: Grievance Redressal Mechanism – Beneficiary Booklet
description: A detailed booklet on how beneficiaries can raise and track grievances related to treatment or claims.

title: ASHA Worker Field Outreach Kit
description: Talking points and visual aids for ASHA workers conducting door-to-door Ayushman Card enrolment awareness.
